fields.description: Panel number containing the draggable field
fields.label: Source Panel

fields.description: Column name in the source panel that is draggable (e.g. name)
fields.label: Drag Field

fields.description: Column name on the target panel that acts as the drop zone
fields.label: Target Column

fields.description: JS that receives each target row and returns true/false to highlight eligible drop targets
fields.label: Eligibility Code

fields.description: JS executed on drop — receives {dragged_row, target_row} context. Call frappe.call() for server actions.
fields.label: Drop Code
